title: astragalus hamiltonii
intro: Astragalus hamiltonii, also known as the Himalayan milkvetch, is a type of perennial legume native to the Himalayan region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its adaptogenic and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to boost the immune system and reduce stress. The medicinal properties of Astragalus hamiltonii include its ability to stimulate the production of white blood cells, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Astragalus hamiltonii is often prepared as a decoction, tea, or capsule, and is used in herbal medicine to promote overall well-being and longevity.
